text.title: Ambiguity and Contradiction Detector Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys, types, and per-field constraints.

example.code: { "doc_ref": "/docs/req/v3.2/checkout.md", "run_id": "amb-2026-05-23-001", "findings": [ { "id": "f-1", "category": "vague_quantifier", "severity": "major", "evidence_quote": "the system should respond quickly", "section_ref": "3.2.1", "remediation_owner": "jane@team.io" }, { "id": "f-2", "category": "contradictory_ac", "severity": "blocking", "evidence_quote": "AC-12 says 5s p95; AC-19 says 2s p95", "section_ref": "AC-12 + AC-19", "remediation_owner": "jane@team.io" } ], "owner": "jane@team.io", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `ambiguity-contradiction-detector` (e.g. empty / placeholder owner, fewer items than minItems, missing evidence_quote / anti_output / exit_criterion as applicable). Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: free-form prose where a structured field is required
